title: Feature Learning Path
description: Build fluency in Feature Learning inside Representation Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Unsupervised Representation Learning
steps.summary: Learning representations from unlabeled data, often using techniques like autoencoders and contrastive learning. It sits inside Representation Learning / Feature Learning. Start after Unsupervised Learning and Q-Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Sparse Coding
steps.summary: Representing data using a sparse set of features or basis functions. It sits inside Representation Learning / Feature Learning. Start after Sparse. It opens into Sparse Coding Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Feature Learning
steps.summary: Feature Learning belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Feature Learning. It sits inside Representation Learning / Feature Learning. Start after Feature and Q-Learning. It opens into Domain-invariant Feature Learning and Deep Feature Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Mutual Information-based Learning
steps.summary: Mutual Information-based Learning belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Feature Learning. It sits inside Representation Learning / Feature Learning. Start after Mutual Information and Q-Learning. It opens into Mutual Information-Based Learning Extensions and Mutual Information-Based Learning Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Mutual Information Maximization Extensions Techniques Extensions
steps.summary: Mutual Information Maximization Extensions Techniques Extensions belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Feature Learning. It sits inside Representation Learning / Feature Learning. Start after Mutual Information Maximization Extensions and Mutual Information Maximization. It opens into Mutual Information Maximization Extensions Techniques Extensions Enhancements and Mutual Information Maximization Extensions Techniques Extensions Enhancements Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Variational Information Bottleneck
steps.summary: Variational Information Bottleneck belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Feature Learning. It sits inside Representation Learning / Feature Learning. Start after Information Bottleneck and Information Bottleneck Models. It opens into Variational Information Bottleneck (VIB) and Variational Information Bottleneck Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Mutual Information Maximization Extensions
steps.summary: Mutual Information Maximization Extensions belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Feature Learning. It sits inside Representation Learning / Feature Learning. Start after Mutual Information Maximization and Mutual Information. It opens into Mutual Information Maximization Extensions Techniques Extensions and Mutual Information Maximization Extensions Techniques Extensions Enhancements.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Mutual Information-Based Learning Techniques
steps.summary: Mutual Information-Based Learning Techniques belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Feature Learning. It sits inside Representation Learning / Feature Learning. Start after Mutual Information-based Learning and Mutual Information. It opens into Mutual Information-Based Learning Extensions Extensions Techniques and Mutual Information-Based Learning Extensions Extensions Techniques Enhancements Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
